---
title: "Assignment 2"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
```

## 1.4

Autocorrelation plot for lag up to 30:

```{r acf, echo=FALSE}
# Input
phi_1 <- -0.7
phi_2 <- -0.2
n_lag = 30


rho <- numeric(n_lag +1)

# Calculate autocorrelation (1-indexed)
rho[1] = 1                            #k=0
rho[2] = -phi_1 / ( 1 + phi_2)        #k=1

#Calculate for k=2,...,30
for (k in 3:(n_lag + 1)) {
  rho[k] = -phi_1 * rho[k-1] - phi_2 * rho[k-2]
}

#df for ggplot
acf_df <- data.frame(
  lag = 0:n_lag,
  autocorrelation = rho
)


# plot - hjálp frá ai
acf_plot <- 
  ggplot(acf_df, aes(x = lag, y = autocorrelation)) +
  # vertical lines from y=0 to the rho value
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) + 
  # Add dots at the tips for a polished look
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) + 
  # Add the dashed zero line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray") + 
  # Add labels and formatting
  labs(
    title = "Theoretical Autocorrelation Function for AR(2)",
    x = "Lag (k)",
    y = expression(rho(k))
  ) +
  theme_minimal() + # A clean, modern theme
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) # Center the title

print(acf_plot)
ggsave("myndir/acf_plot.png", plot = acf_plot, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)


```

## 2.1

```{r 2_1, echo = FALSE}
set.seed(67)
sim_2_1 <- arima.sim(model = list(ar=-0.6), n=200) # -0.6 af thvi ad R vill hafa thetta a forminu [X_t = phi_1*X_{t-1} + epsilon] en vid gerum [X_t + phi_1 * X_{t-1} = epsilon]

plot(sim_2_1, main="Simulated AR(1)")
acf(sim_2_1, main="ACF of AR(1)")
pacf(sim_2_1, main="PACF of AR(1)")

 
png("myndir/plot_2_1.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 1, 2, 3), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
plot(sim_2_1, main="Simulated AR(1)")
acf(sim_2_1, main="ACF of AR(1)")
pacf(sim_2_1, main="PACF of AR(1)")


dev.off()
```

## 2.2
```{r 2_2, echo = FALSE}
set.seed(67)
sim_2_2 = arima.sim(model = list(ar = c(rep(0,11),0.9)), n=200)

plot(sim_2_2, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_2, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_2, main="PACF")

png("myndir/plot_2_2.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 1, 2, 3), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
plot(sim_2_2, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_2, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_2, main="PACF")


dev.off()

```

## 2.3

```{r 2_3, echo = FALSE}
set.seed(67)
sim_2_3 = arima.sim(model = list(ar=0.9, ma = c(rep(0,11),-0.7)), n=200)

plot(sim_2_3, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_3, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_3, main="PACF")

png("myndir/plot_2_3.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)

layout(matrix(c(1, 1, 2, 3), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
plot(sim_2_3, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_3, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_3, main="PACF")

dev.off()

```

## 2.4

```{r 2_4_, echo = FALSE}
set.seed(67)
sim_2_4 = arima.sim(model = list(ar = c(-0.6, rep(0, 10), -0.8, -0.48)), n=200)

plot(sim_2_4, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_4, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_4, main="PACF")

png("myndir/plot_2_4.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)

layout(matrix(c(1, 1, 2, 3), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
plot(sim_2_4, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_4, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_4, main="PACF")

dev.off()
```

## 2.5

```{r 2_5, echo = FALSE}
set.seed(67)

# Lags 2–11: 0
sim_2_5 = arima.sim(model = list(ma = c(0.4, rep(0, 10), -0.8, -0.32)), n=200)
plot(sim_2_5, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_5, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_5, main="PACF")

png("myndir/plot_2_5.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)

layout(matrix(c(1, 1, 2, 3), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
plot(sim_2_5, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_5, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_5, main="PACF")

dev.off()
```

## 2.6
```{r 2_6, echo = FALSE}
set.seed(67)
sim_2_6 = arima.sim(model = list(
    ar = c(rep(0, 11), 0.7),
    ma = -0.4
    ), n=200)

plot(sim_2_6, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_6, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_6, main="PACF")

png("myndir/plot_2_6.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)

layout(matrix(c(1, 1, 2, 3), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
plot(sim_2_6, main="Simulated model")
acf(sim_2_6, main="ACF")
pacf(sim_2_6, main="PACF")

dev.off()

```
